name: Viktoriya Serebryakov
alt_names: ヴィクトーリヤ・イヴァーノヴナ・セレブリャコーフ
description: Viktoriya Ivanovna Serebryakov is a mage and a conscript in the Empire's army, and in the past were a member of Platoon 3 under [Tanya](https://anilist.co/character/121052)'s leadership. After that, she joined the new Wing Battalion named "V601" to serve as Tanya's adjutant.
